name: Enabled User Right in AD to Control User Objects
description: Detects the assignment of the SeEnableDelegationPrivilege user right in Active Directory. This privilege allows a user to delegate authentication, which can be abused to gain control over other Active Directory user objects.

prompts.prompt: Assignment of 'SeEnableDelegationPrivilege' detected in Active Directory. This privilege can be abused for unauthorized control over user objects. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User (assigner)** {user}, **Target User (assignee)** {target_user}, **Details** {details}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for potential privilege escalation or abuse.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for 'A user right was assigned' (4704).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user who assigned the privilege.

parameters.name: target_user
parameters.description: The user who was assigned the privilege.
